---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for improving V Drive
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## ✨ Feature Description

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to see added.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe the problem you're trying to solve.

### Current Workaround

Any workaround you're currently using (if applicable).

## 💡 Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions you've considered.

## 📊 Use Case

Describe how this feature would be used in a real-world scenario.

## 👥 Impact

Who would benefit from this feature?

- [ ] Individual contributors
- [ ] Teams
- [ ] Enterprise users
- [ ] All users

## 📈 Priority

What priority would you assign to this?

- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

## 📎 Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I searched for existing feature requests first
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's goals
- [ ] I'm willing to help implement this feature
